name: Shrinkflex (Thailand) Public Company Limited
summary: Shrinkflex (Thailand) Public Company Limited manufactures and distributes PVC and PET shrink sleeve labels in Thailand. It offers shrinkable packaging by gravure and digital process. The company also offers stretch film products; and provides consulting services. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Chachoengsao, Thailand.
